judge_thought:
Explanation:
The table presents a set of stations with shared opening dates and an extension where multiple stations (Sherman Way, Roscoe, Nordhoff, Chatsworth) were added simultaneously on June 30, 2012. Because these entries are grouped without a singularly designated terminal station and the dataset uses placeholders for undefined or non-applicable values (e.g., “n/a,” “park & ride lot,” “parking expanded”), returning a null value for “the last station on the list” correctly reflects that there is no uniquely defined final station. This interpretation aligns with the structure and semantics of the table, supporting the Prediction Answer of null.
